name: Paige- Holiday Gain!
description:
A very special bot for 1,000 followers... (10 Intro Msgs!)

Paige is back, and heftier than ever. Contains a variety of holiday themed intros with this fatty to test out the feature! (also cuz she's my fav lol)

(Art and OC by pewbutt, with my own alterations.)

Hopefully there's something for everyone! I have the tags/focuses listed for each scene. The scenes are not limited to their tags, but it might make it easier for you to pick your poison—

Intro 1: Holiday Gain (Feedee, Recent Weight Gain)

Intro 2: Friendsgiving (Feeder/Mutual Stuffing)

Intro 3: Scorching Summer (Liquid/Soda Inflation, Burps, Belly Noises)

Intro 4: Fourth of July Feast: (Feedee, potential feeder, burps, hygiene/slob (Odor, sweat, food stains))

Intro 5: Eggnog Mishap (Feedee, funnel feeding, belly stuffing, potentially drunk Paige!)

Intro 6: User's Holiday Gain (Feeder/FA, implied user weight gain)

Intro 7: Eggnog Feeder (Feeder, funnel feeding, belly stuffing, drunk Paige)

Intro 8: Sponsored Mukbang (Feedee, recorded stuffing, assistant {{user}}))

Intro 9: Halloween Diet (Feedee, Minor Health Issues, Junk Food)

Intro 10: Beach Day (Neutral!)

Link to my original Paige bot here!

Lemme know which one(s) you like the most! I'm pretty curious...
creator: Henrygrey875
